title: 5 Tips for Deploying AI Agents to Production
summary: AWS Developers presents five production best practices for TypeScript AI agents: streaming tool call events for UI responsiveness, layered authentication with API Gateway and Cognito, type-safe contracted database access with tenant isolation, guardrails and cost budgets via lifecycle hooks, and comprehensive observability through OpenTelemetry tracing and built-in metrics. The guidance emphasizes patterns that apply across platforms but demonstrates them on AWS infrastructure.
